entries.source: Turn notes into matching games for vocabulary, concepts, people/events, formulas, examples, or cause-effect pairs.
entries.value: Maida bayanin kula zuwa wasannin daidaitawa don ƙamus, ra'ayoyi, mutane/abubuwan da suka faru, dabaru, misalai, ko nau'i-nau'i na dalili da sakamako.

entries.source: Learners exploring active learning topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Masu koyo da ke binciken batutuwan koyo na aiki waɗanda ke son jagora mai amfani maimakon akwatin amsa na gaba ɗaya.

entries.source: This mode is tuned for matching game generator with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: An tsara wannan yanayin don mai samar da wasan daidaitawa tare da nasa saƙonni, misalai, da tsarin koyo.

entries.value: Ƙirƙiri lambobin yabo don daidaito, ƙwarewa, ƙarfin hali, bita, haɗin gwiwa, da kammala ayyuka.
